title: senecio leuceria
intro: Senecio leuceria, also known as White Fleabane, is a perennial plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and pyrrolizidine alkaloids, which possess anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Senecio leuceria include treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as having potential anti-cancer and anti-viral effects. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, which can be used topically or internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
